lines.text: This watch was a gift from my best friend. It runs five minutes slow because he was always late, so I changed it with magic to match him. But now he is gone after a recent adventure. Should I make the watch normal and use it to search for him?

choices.choiceText: No. Keep it as a gift. He’ll come back.
Fix it. You need accurate time to search properly.

lines.text: Yes... that’s what he would do. He’d be angry if I changed it, but I’d rather keep the gift than lose the memory.
Maybe accuracy matters more than sentiment when someone is missing. Still, it hurts to hear it said so plainly.
